body.title: CLOSED: /dream skill to trigger Igor dreaming
body.result: dream skill created + deployed; triggers Igor dreaming via channel, polls 30s, graceful timeout
body.description:
Igor's dreaming module is shipped (T-igor-dreaming-module) but there is no CC-side command to trigger it manually. AutoDream (Claude's memory management) exposes /dream for exactly this pattern. Right now triggering Igor's dreaming requires manually posting to the channel.

Create ~/.claude/skills/dream: (1) call mcp__librarian__channel_send with content 'trigger dreaming pass' to Igor's channel; (2) wait briefly (poll channel_read up to 30s) for Igor's dreaming summary response; (3) report what was synthesized and proposed. If no response in 30s, report 'dreaming triggered — check channel for result when Igor completes pass'.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/dream (new skill file)
**Design rules:** skill-file only — no changes to dreaming.py or Igor internals; uses existing channel_send MCP tool
**Scope boundary:** In: skill file, channel trigger, response poll, report. Out: modifying dreaming.py, changing dreaming schedule.
**Test plan:** /dream sends message to channel. Skill reports dreaming summary when Igor responds, or timeout message if not. Skill does not error if Igor is offline.
